# Elon Musk live daily digest 2026-06-23

更新時間：2026-06-23 09:01 UTC+08:00

> 來源說明：以下多數為媒體新聞與外界評論，屬他人報導與解讀，並非 Elon Musk 本人立場，也不代表本技能包作者立場。新聞與評論可能有誤、過時或具爭議，引用前請自行查證原始出處。

## 摘要

- 新增項目：40
- 來源類型：musk_direct_public_web, news_commentary, news_report
- 錯誤或略過：1

## musk_direct_public_web

- [Absolutely. This is a total lie.](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2069108349656834236)
  來源：@elonmusk；時間：2026-06-22T17:20:47+00:00
  摘要：Absolutely. This is a total lie.   All DOGE did was require contact with the aid recipients to confirm that funds were being used legitimately. Anything less than this is insane!  Multiple people from USAID have been charged by the Justice Department with stealing money.

## 正式技能包更新判斷

本日資料先進 daily digest。若要改 `SKILL.md`，請依 `references/promotion-gate.md` 審查。
